theme: Newborn Hep B birth dose debate
explanation: The posts center on arguments over whether babies need the hepatitis B vaccine at birth, with many defending the birth dose by citing household transmission risks and prevention of infant infections, liver cancer, and deaths.
The posts center on a doctor receiving insults and political pushback on social media for defending or discussing the Hepatitis B vaccine.
The posts center on arguing against false claims that Hepatitis B is only linked to sex, drugs, or “addicts,” while defending newborn vaccination and broader transmission routes.
The posts promote getting tested for Hepatitis B alongside HIV, genetic compatibility, and other basic health checks, especially before marriage or as preventive year-end screening.
